3082110.name: FootCareer ULT
3082110.description:
- FootCareer ULT -
(ALL PROFIT FROM THIS GAME IS REINVESTED INTO DEVELOPMENT)

FootCareer ULT... What is there not to say about it? The all in one Football Career simulation game. With infinitely replayable gameplay, and
near infinite possibilities, you won't be disappointed. Achieve your dreams in this simplistic, easy-to-understand Football Career simulator,
which recieves constant updates and fixes to ensure you, the player, gets the best football experience you could dream of!

- Features -

. 200+ clubs from across the globe

. Large variety of nationalities, traits, and information about your player

. Virtually infinite playtime

. Constant updates / development
